title: SSTextures
description: A resourcepack made entirely by hand, pixel by pixel freehand drawings
body:
Are you tired of beautiful masterpieces of resource packs? Do you crave eyeball-burning visuals and sound effects that make cave noises sound like lullibies? Look no further!

SSTextures is a resource pack made with zero artistic talent and negative effort to bring you the most ugly resource pack you'll ever see.

I personally drew every single texture, and recorded every single sound, that you see! So enjoy what little talent I have, because it wont improve!
